CustomField.description: Controls how many records are processed per batch execution during legacy Opportunity rollup calculations. Default is 200. Reduce this value if rollup batch jobs fail due to Apex heap size or CPU time limits. Only applies to the legacy rollup engine; Customizable Rollups have their own batch size settings.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Number of records per batch when calculating donor rollup statistics. Default is 200. Reduce if rollup jobs fail due to governor limits.
CustomField.label: Rollup Batch Size
